targets.rawSql:
SELECT sum(f.qty_open) AS value
FROM inventory_mart.fact_purchase_order_lines f
LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON p.sku_id = f.sku_id
WHERE f.qty_open > 0
  AND ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR p.category IN (${category:singlequote}))
  AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR p.brand IN (${brand:singlequote}))
  AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR f.sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote}))

SELECT count() AS value
FROM inventory_mart.fact_purchase_order_lines f
LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON p.sku_id = f.sku_id
WHERE f.qty_open > 0
  AND ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR p.category IN (${category:singlequote}))
  AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR p.brand IN (${brand:singlequote}))
  AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR f.sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote}))

SELECT round(avg(lead_time_days), 2) AS value
FROM inventory_mart.dim_supplier

SELECT round(sum(s.qty) / 30, 2) AS value
FROM inventory_mart.fact_sales_order_lines s
LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON p.sku_id = s.sku_id
WHERE s.created_date >= today() - 30
  AND ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR p.category IN (${category:singlequote}))
  AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR p.brand IN (${brand:singlequote}))
  AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR s.sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote}))

WITH latest_snapshot AS (
  SELECT max(snapshot_date) AS snapshot_date
  FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily
)

            SELECT countIf(p.reorder_point > 0 AND s.available_qty < p.reorder_point) AS value
            FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily s
            LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON p.sku_id = s.sku_id
            LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_warehouse w ON w.warehouse_id = s.warehouse_id
            WHERE s.snapshot_date = (SELECT snapshot_date FROM latest_snapshot)
              AND ('${warehouse:raw}'='__all' OR s.warehouse_id IN (${warehouse:singlequote}))
              AND ('${region:raw}'='__all' OR w.region IN (${region:singlequote}))
              AND ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR p.category IN (${category:singlequote}))
              AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR p.brand IN (${brand:singlequote}))
              AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR s.sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote}))

WITH latest_snapshot AS (
  SELECT max(snapshot_date) AS snapshot_date
  FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily
)

            SELECT round(sum(greatest(p.max_stock - s.available_qty, 0)), 0) AS value
            FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily s
            LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON p.sku_id = s.sku_id
            LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_warehouse w ON w.warehouse_id = s.warehouse_id
            WHERE
              s.snapshot_date = (SELECT snapshot_date FROM latest_snapshot)
              AND p.reorder_point > 0
              AND s.available_qty < p.reorder_point
              AND ('${warehouse:raw}'='__all' OR s.warehouse_id IN (${warehouse:singlequote}))
              AND ('${region:raw}'='__all' OR w.region IN (${region:singlequote}))
              AND ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR p.category IN (${category:singlequote}))
              AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR p.brand IN (${brand:singlequote}))
              AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR s.sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote}))

SELECT
  m.event_date AS time,
  sum(m.qty_in) AS inbound_qty,
  sum(m.qty_out) AS outbound_qty
FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_movement m
LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON p.sku_id = m.sku_id
LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_warehouse w ON w.warehouse_id = m.warehouse_id
WHERE m.event_date >= today() - 90
  AND ('${warehouse:raw}'='__all' OR m.warehouse_id IN (${warehouse:singlequote}))
  AND ('${region:raw}'='__all' OR w.region IN (${region:singlequote}))
  AND ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR p.category IN (${category:singlequote}))
  AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR p.brand IN (${brand:singlequote}))
  AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR m.sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote}))
GROUP BY m.event_date
ORDER BY m.event_date

SELECT
  coalesce(w.warehouse_name, m.warehouse_id) AS warehouse,
  sum(m.qty_in) AS received_qty,
  sum(m.qty_out) AS dispatched_qty
FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_movement m
LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_warehouse w ON w.warehouse_id = m.warehouse_id
LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON p.sku_id = m.sku_id
WHERE m.event_date >= today() - 30
  AND ('${warehouse:raw}'='__all' OR m.warehouse_id IN (${warehouse:singlequote}))
  AND ('${region:raw}'='__all' OR w.region IN (${region:singlequote}))
  AND ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR p.category IN (${category:singlequote}))
  AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR p.brand IN (${brand:singlequote}))
  AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR m.sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote}))
GROUP BY warehouse
ORDER BY received_qty DESC

panels.title: Receiving vs Dispatch by Warehouse (30 days)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  m.sku_id AS sku_id,
  coalesce(p.sku_name, m.sku_id) AS sku_name,
  coalesce(p.category, 'Unknown') AS category,
  sum(m.qty_in) AS qty_in,
  sum(m.qty_out) AS qty_out,
  sum(abs(m.qty_change)) AS movement_volume,
  round(sum(abs(m.qty_change) * toFloat64(dp.unit_cost)), 2) AS movement_value_proxy
FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_movement m
LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON p.sku_id = m.sku_id
LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product dp ON dp.sku_id = m.sku_id
LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_warehouse w ON w.warehouse_id = m.warehouse_id
WHERE m.event_date >= today() - 30
  AND ('${warehouse:raw}'='__all' OR m.warehouse_id IN (${warehouse:singlequote}))
  AND ('${region:raw}'='__all' OR w.region IN (${region:singlequote}))
  AND ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR p.category IN (${category:singlequote}))
  AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR p.brand IN (${brand:singlequote}))
  AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR m.sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote}))
GROUP BY m.sku_id, sku_name, category
ORDER BY movement_volume DESC
LIMIT 20

WITH latest_snapshot AS (
  SELECT max(snapshot_date) AS snapshot_date
  FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily
),
latest_stock AS (
  SELECT
    s.warehouse_id AS warehouse_id,
    s.sku_id AS sku_id,
    round(sum(s.available_qty), 2) AS available_qty,
    round(sum(s.inventory_value), 2) AS inventory_value
  FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily s
  LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_warehouse w ON w.warehouse_id = s.warehouse_id
  LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON p.sku_id = s.sku_id
  WHERE s.snapshot_date = (SELECT snapshot_date FROM latest_snapshot)
    AND ('${warehouse:raw}'='__all' OR s.warehouse_id IN (${warehouse:singlequote}))
    AND ('${region:raw}'='__all' OR w.region IN (${region:singlequote}))
    AND ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR p.category IN (${category:singlequote}))
    AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR p.brand IN (${brand:singlequote}))
    AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR s.sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote}))
  GROUP BY s.warehouse_id, s.sku_id
),
recent_moves AS (
  SELECT
    warehouse_id,
    sku_id,
    max(event_date) AS last_event_date
  FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_movement
  WHERE ('${warehouse:raw}'='__all' OR warehouse_id IN (${warehouse:singlequote}))
    AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote}))
  GROUP BY warehouse_id, sku_id
),
result AS (
  SELECT
    ls.warehouse_id,
    ls.sku_id,
    coalesce(p.sku_name, ls.sku_id) AS sku_name,
    coalesce(p.category, 'Unknown') AS category,
    ls.available_qty,
    ls.inventory_value,
    rm.last_event_date
  FROM latest_stock ls
  LEFT JOIN recent_moves rm ON rm.sku_id = ls.sku_id AND rm.warehouse_id = ls.warehouse_id
  LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON p.sku_id = ls.sku_id
  WHERE ls.available_qty > 0 AND (rm.last_event_date IS NULL OR rm.last_event_date < today() - 30)
)
SELECT *
FROM result
UNION ALL
SELECT
  '' AS warehouse_id,
  '' AS sku_id,
  'No slow-moving SKUs in last 30 days for current filters' AS sku_name,
  '' AS category,
  toFloat64(0) AS available_qty,
  toFloat64(0) AS inventory_value,
  CAST(NULL AS Nullable(Date)) AS last_event_date
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM result)
ORDER BY inventory_value DESC, available_qty DESC
LIMIT 20

WITH latest_snapshot AS (
  SELECT max(snapshot_date) AS snapshot_date
  FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily
),
current_stock AS (
  SELECT
    s.sku_id AS sku_id,
    sum(s.available_qty) AS available_qty
  FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily s
  LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_warehouse w ON w.warehouse_id = s.warehouse_id
  LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON p.sku_id = s.sku_id
  WHERE s.snapshot_date = (SELECT snapshot_date FROM latest_snapshot)
    AND ('${warehouse:raw}'='__all' OR s.warehouse_id IN (${warehouse:singlequote}))
    AND ('${region:raw}'='__all' OR w.region IN (${region:singlequote}))
    AND ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR p.category IN (${category:singlequote}))
    AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR p.brand IN (${brand:singlequote}))
    AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR s.sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote}))
  GROUP BY s.sku_id
),
daily_demand AS (
  SELECT
    s.sku_id AS sku_id,
    round(sum(s.qty) / 30, 2) AS avg_daily_demand
  FROM inventory_mart.fact_sales_order_lines s
  LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON p.sku_id = s.sku_id
  WHERE s.created_date >= today() - 30
    AND ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR p.category IN (${category:singlequote}))
    AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR p.brand IN (${brand:singlequote}))
    AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR s.sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote}))
  GROUP BY s.sku_id
),
result AS (
  SELECT
    cs.sku_id AS sku_id,
    coalesce(p.sku_name, cs.sku_id) AS sku_name,
    coalesce(p.category, 'Unknown') AS category,
    cs.available_qty,
    p.reorder_point,
    p.max_stock,
    coalesce(dd.avg_daily_demand, 0) AS avg_daily_demand,
    greatest(p.max_stock - cs.available_qty, 0) AS recommended_reorder_qty
  FROM current_stock cs
  LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON p.sku_id = cs.sku_id
  LEFT JOIN daily_demand dd ON dd.sku_id = cs.sku_id
  WHERE p.reorder_point > 0 AND cs.available_qty < p.reorder_point
)
SELECT *
FROM result
UNION ALL
SELECT
  '' AS sku_id,
  'No SKUs currently below reorder point for current filters' AS sku_name,
  '' AS category,
  toFloat64(0) AS available_qty,
  toInt32(0) AS reorder_point,
  toInt32(0) AS max_stock,
  toFloat64(0) AS avg_daily_demand,
  toFloat64(0) AS recommended_reorder_qty
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM result)
ORDER BY recommended_reorder_qty DESC, avg_daily_demand DESC
LIMIT 50

SELECT if(count()=0,0,round(sum(if(lead_time_days <= 7,1,0))/count(),4)) AS supplier_on_time_sla_rate FROM inventory_mart.dim_supplier WHERE ('${supplier:raw}'='__all' OR supplier_name IN (${supplier:singlequote}))

SELECT toDateTime(created_date) AS time, sum(qty_open) AS open_qty, sum(qty_received) AS received_qty FROM inventory_mart.fact_purchase_order_lines f LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON f.sku_id = p.sku_id WHERE $__timeFilter(created_date) AND ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR p.category IN (${category:singlequote})) AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR p.brand IN (${brand:singlequote})) AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR f.sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote})) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
